name: Mikey's Mackerel Cat Munchies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. In a medium-sized bowl, mash the mackerel with a fork into tiny pieces. Combine it with the remaining ingredients and mix well. Drop mixture by 1/4 teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet. Bake for 8 minutes. Cool to room temperature and store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
